THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY $371.30 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $436.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
